{
  "title": "Classic Diamond Solitaire Engagement Ring - 18K Gold",
  "description": "A traditional solitaire engagement ring featuring a 6.5mm round brilliant cut diamond (approximately 1 carat) secured with a 6-prong setting on an 18K gold band. The band has a comfort-fit interior with a width of 2.5mm tapering to 2mm at the base of the setting. The prong setting elevates the diamond 5mm above the band for maximum light exposure and brilliance.",
  "dimensions": {
    "width": 20.5,
    "height": 8.5,
    "depth": 20.5
  },
  "features": [
    "6-prong cathedral setting for diamond mounting",
    "Comfort-fit rounded interior band profile",
    "Tapered band from 2.5mm to 2mm width",
    "6.5mm diameter setting for 1ct diamond",
    "Polished finish on all surfaces",
    "Size 7 (17.3mm internal diameter)",
    "2mm band thickness",
    "Reinforced gallery under setting"
  ],
  "material": "18K Gold (75% gold, 25% alloy)",
  "file_format": "STEP",
  "complexity": "medium"
